title: AgentIdentity Verifiable Credential
description: A generic Verifiable Credential attesting that the subject DID belongs to an AI agent. Not specific to any vendor or platform.

@context.description: JSON-LD context array. Must include the base W3C VC context.

type.description: Credential type array. Must include 'VerifiableCredential' and 'AgentIdentity'.

id.description: Unique identifier for this credential instance (URI).

issuanceDate.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the credential was issued.

id.description: DID of the AI agent being attested.

agentName.description: Human-readable display name for the agent.

agentVersion.description: Software version of the agent. Semver format recommended.

agentType.description: Operator-assigned type tag. Examples: assistant, worker, orchestrator.

registeredAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the agent was first registered.

proof.description: Cryptographic proof. When the credential is JWT-encoded, this field is absent (the proof is the JWT signature).
